name: Anz Group Holdings Limited
analysis: ANZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$35.7900, stop A$33.0264, target A$39.7818 (1.44:1) — then trail it.
